body:

sure the whole team is there. Beto and I will give updates on the
campaign, we’ll release our fundraising numbers, and then we’ll detail our
plan to win.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/join-our-team-meeting//?source=ema20191010-60536&t=1001&akid=60536%2E444211%2ESIGO-T ]Can you RSVP to join our team meeting tomorrow at 7pm ET/4pm PT? Our

subject: [IMPEACHMENT UPDATE]: Make 'em squeal

body:
Joni Ernst seemed stumped when asked directly about foreign interference in our elections. Tell Sen. Ernst that no, it's never ok to ask for foreign governments to intervene in our elections. Chip in

| | Friends, There is no doubt that foreign governments interfere in our elections.

Seems Senator Joni Ernst isn't so sure that foreign interference is a bad thing. name: Team Hick
subject: Gardner refused to answer this question five times
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Reporters in Colorado asked Cory Gardner a simple, yes-or-no question: Is it appropriate for the President of the United States to ask a foreign leader to investigate a political rival? | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714bc/691c9bd/6fca0cd7/11a79fc0/2463136768/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team, a few hours ago, reporters in Colorado asked Cory Gardner a simple yes-or-no question: Is it appropriate for the President of the United States to ask a foreign leader to investigate a political rival?

The answer should be easy: _Of course not._

**But in less than two minutes, Gardner refused to answer that very simple question _five times_.**

What's more, he tried to imply that asking that kind of question was part of a partisan attack effort. Give us a break. There's nothing partisan about expecting our elected officials to know the difference between right and wrong. Cory Gardner took an oath to protect the Constitution, not the president.

[**_Add your name (just once, not five times) to demand Cory Gardner answer the simple question he 's trying to dodge._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://jhfp.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/help-remind-cory-gardner-the-answer-is-no?source=em_pet_20191010_TH_20191010-pet-TH-GardnerDodge-all_all_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,

Team Hick [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_pet_20191010_TH_20191010-pet-TH-GardnerDodge-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

name: Save Minnesota's Senate Seat
subject: Did you just hear that?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Did you see Trump's rally? We need to act fast in order to be ready for whatever Trump and Jason Lewis do to flip Minnesota red. Chip in to our rapid response fund NOW >>

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191010trumpresponse-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Team,

Trump's rally in Minneapolis just finished, and one thing is very clear: He's going to do everything he can to defeat Tina and turn Minnesota red. **On stage tonight, Trump endorsed Tina's extreme right-wing opponent, Jason Lewis, and then attacked her for the work she's doing for you -- for Minnesotans -- in the Senate.**

But here's the truth: Just this year, Tina introduced the Emergency Access to Insulin Act, making sure people can access insulin when they need it, as well as the Affordable Medications Act, which will lower the cost of prescription drugs. To combat climate change, Tina introduced the Clean Energy Standard Act, which will set a clean energy standard and aims to achieve net-zero emissions from the electricity sector.

You can count on it -- Tina will always work hard and put Minnesotans first.

Trump and Lewis are two of a kind, and they are going to work hand-in-hand in this election so we need to be ready for whatever they do next. **With everything from reproductive health care to the Supreme Court on the line, we need to come together right now to put everything we've got behind protecting this seat and taking back the Senate.**

**This isn't the end of Trump's attacks -- we need to act now so we can be prepared for anything coming from Trump and Lewis. name: Cory Booker
subject: Running for president is a marathon, not a sprint
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
But you run for president because you care about our nation and the people who call it home. I'm running because I love my country and know I'd bring change for every American -- not just the few peop
| | |
---
| Team -- When you run for president, they tell you to treat it like a marathon, not a sprint. There are never enough hours. It's not always easy. But you run for president because you care about our nation and the people who call it home. I'm running because I love my country and know I'd bring change for every American -- not just the few people at the top -- to the Oval Office. The other thing they tell you is, well, **how critical it is to raise money.** That's why I want to be frank with you: we're pacing behind where we need to be for October. **We 're almost halfway through the month, but we're not halfway towards reaching our $3 million October fundraising goal to fund the campaign this month. Will you chip in to get us closer?** | If you've saved your payment information with

My campaign manager, Addisu, told the world last week that we have to raise almost $3 million -- $2,998,771 to be exact -- in October to cover our campaign expenses and continue to grow a movement that can win.
Over the past eight months, I've had the opportunity to meet hardworking Americans across the nation and hear directly from them about what a better America for all should look like. I've heard from grieving parents in New Hampshire about the loss of their daughter to the opioid epidemic. This is an issue that's sweeping America and I've pledged my support to tackle the very serious problem our country is facing.
I've heard from a concerned young woman in Iowa about what I'd do to bring the country together to stop the gun violence plaguing our nation. She moved to Decorah a year ago from Las Vegas after the shooting. She courageously fought through tears explaining how the shooting changed her life forever -- all while being accompanied by her eight-year-old sister.
It's conversations like these that have inspired the things that I will fight for beginning on day one of entering the White House. But if that is going to become a reality, we need to get back on track for fundraising this month.
**[I'm asking for your support, friend. Will you step up to get our fundraising trajectory back on track? Chip in $5 to close the gap.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-october?refcode=em_fr_20191011_CB_20191011-fr-CB-octgoal-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
Back to the trail,
Cory

body:
| Get your copy of _Unplanned_ DVD today | Peter, The movie that is changing lives and influencing the conversation about abortion all over the world is up for “INSPIRATIONAL FILM OF THE YEAR” at the GMA Dove Awards! body:
Together we can take the majority in the House of Delegates.
| | | [](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21d0/39260142/427b793f/6263956f/392627887/VEsH/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/twa19")
---
Friends-- I am proud to endorse Delegate Dawn Adams, a friend and colleague, in her re-election for Virginia's 68th District in the House of Delegates. Dawn has proven in her first term that she has the voice and perspective Virginia needs to progress into a more prosperous future. As a doctor, I know the valuable experience and knowledge that Delegate Adams brings to the legislature. Her experience as a nurse practitioner is instrumental to shaping policy that will build a healthier and safer Virginia. In order for us to pass meaningful legislation over the next two years, we must ensure that we elect a Democratic Majority in the House of Delegates. We cannot usher in new leadership in the House without keeping the seats we already have. I am proud to stand with Delegate Adams, and I am calling on you to do the same. [**Please show your support with a contribution of $20 or more today to ensure Dawn has the resources she needs to win on November 5.**](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21d0/39260142/427b793f/6263956e/392627887/VEsE/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/northam-adams") Together, we can take the majority in the House of Delegates. body:
Hoosiers are voting. This week, early voting opened for municipal races throughout Indiana, and in just 25 days, it’ll be Election Day. And I’m.......

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/in-25-days?e=1acd9bb3d6)
25 Days

Hoosiers are voting. This week, early voting opened for municipal races throughout Indiana, and in just 25 days, it’ll be Election Day. And I’m here to tell you how critical these next 25 days will be.

That’s because over the next 25 days, Hoosiers will pick their candidates in races that don’t get nearly as many headlines as the crazy things that Nancy Pelosi says. But you better believe these races are a whole lot more important. Our mayors and other local elected officials focus on the issues that impact your life daily – supporting local jobs, keeping our neighborhoods safe, paving our roads, supporting quality of life, and so much more.

So I’m giving you a challenge – over the next 25 days, dedicate some time to helping your friends, family and neighbors learn about your great local Republicans running for office. Tell them about their qualifications, and their plans to help continue Indiana’s incredible momentum. And tell them about early voting options, and where they can get all of the information through the Secretary of State’s Voter Portal (https://indianavoters.in.gov/?mc_cid=7197fc6829&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .

And most importantly, make sure that you get out and vote!

-Chairman Kyle Hupfer

P.S. This week, I wrote an op-ed that ran in the Fort Wayne Journal Gazette talking about why it’s critical that voters in Fort Wayne come together to support Tim Smith to be the city’s next mayor. Check it out here! (https://www.journalgazette.net/search/results/?operator=search&keyword=hupfer&mc_cid=7197fc6829&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Governor Holcomb's Week That Was

Providing Lasting Impact to Hoosiers!

It’s been another busy week for Governor Holcomb! This included announcing that nearly $100 million will go to communities throughout Indiana as part of the Next Level Roads: Community Crossings Initiative and announcing that the NBA All-Star 2021 Host Committee launched a $1 million legacy initiative for youth-serving nonprofits across Indiana.
* Governor Holcomb announced that 229 Indiana cities, towns and counties received a combined $99.2 million in state matching funds for local road projects through the Next Level Roads: Community Crossings Initiative. These infrastructure improvements will help improve the quality of life and economic opportunities for Hoosiers in these communities. Click here (https://www.in.gov/indot/files/Recipient%202019_2%20map_10_2_19update.pdf?mc_cid=7197fc6829&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) to see the communities that received this round of awards!
* Governor Holcomb and the NBA All-Star 2021 Host Committee announced a $1 million legacy initiative focused on youth-serving nonprofit organizations across Indiana as part of the NBA All-Star 2021 Celebration! The initiative will provide grants for 21 brick and mortar improvement projects that focus on health and wellness (eg., indoor/outdoor basketball courts, playgrounds) or education (eg., STEM labs, reading centers)!

Both of these projects will have a real and lasting impact on Hoosiers throughout the state!
http://indiana.gop/2019supersaturdays?mc_cid=7197fc6829&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
Just Four Weekends Remaining:
Super Saturdays 2019

Countdown – just four Saturdays until 2019 Election Day, and we need your help to make sure our Republican mayoral, city council and other municipal candidates win. Sign-up now to volunteer for an upcoming Super Saturday! (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ae987bf9c8&e=f86a26adea&mc_cid=7197fc6829&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

As part of our upcoming Super Saturdays, we have four opportunities throughout Indiana over the next five weekends for you to volunteer on several down-to-the-wire races where your work could help set our candidates over the top -- making sure that they cross the finish line first.

body:

\------
Yang Gang --

I have to say, these debates are tough.

12 candidates, the same types of questions, and no time to dig into the issues that actually matter to everyday people.

Especially when all I want is for Andrew to be given some time to talk about what’s happening in this country.

Amazon is closing stores in communities across America and paying zero dollars in taxes. Healthcare is broken. Families are struggling because the economy is changing and none of the establishment politicians on stage have answers.

We have to be the difference in this equation, team. We have to make a splash so big before the debate that the media and the moderators can’t ignore us. Hitting this goal of 40,000 contributions will do it. subject: Ukraine Smoke and Mirrors
body:
"Democrats and the media for three years used a fog of facts and speculation to lull America into..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5833cffdff&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Ukraine Smoke and Mirrors**

“Democrats and the media for three years used a fog of facts and speculation to lull America into forgetting there was never a shred of evidence of Trump-Russia collusion. They flooded the zone with another flurry of scattershot claims in their campaign against Justice Brett Kavanaugh. Republicans might bear these tactics in mind as they confront the left’s new impeachment push,” Kimberly Strassel writes in _The Wall Street Journal_.

There are numerous, grave problems with House Democrats’ impeachment push, including the whistleblower’s secondhand information and potentially major conflicts of interest. “But what matters more is the accuracy of the complaint itself,” Strassel says.

“The real news of the past few weeks has been the steady accumulation of evidence that its central claim is totally wrong.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cf3c364003&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “I’ve been in an auto parts factory for 50 years. Times in the U.S. have never been better,” auto parts executive Shahid Khan says. Khan “said the current manufacturing landscape looks a lot different than previous conceptions, giving him confidence in the future of the field,” Kevin Stankiewicz reports for [CNBC](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d70d0d423e&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Improving access to affordable and high-quality childcare is the mission of the president's daughter and adviser, Ivanka Trump,” Kera Mashek writes for [FOX4KC](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=44ed10c8a6&e=3ee4985eea). Yesterday, Ms. Trump hosted a roundtable with Health and Human Services Secretary Alex Azar, where she toured the Guadalupe Center childcare facility.
---
|
---
| “It shouldn’t be news to anyone that the move by House Democrats to impeach President Trump has never been a serious exercise in loyalty to the Constitution. But it’s nice to see that some liberals are admitting it openly,” Eddie Scarry writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=25cb433778&e=3ee4985eea). One example: A _New York Times_ op-ed from yesterday, where Cornell law professor Josh Chafetz blurted out—“perhaps inadvertently”—that impeachment “will have been a waste if it isn’t done before the 2020 election.”
---
|

body:
We've been outspent in a big way. Matt Bevin is a self-funder who can dump in millions of his personal fortune whenever he wants.
|
---

| | Peter,

Let's be blunt. We've been outspent in a big way. Matt Bevin is a self-funder who can dump in _millions of his personal fortune_ whenever he wants. And he has a lot of out-of-state dark money backers who have poured huge amounts of money into this race.

But despite all this big money behind Bevin, **Andy continues to lead.** This race is rated as a "toss-up" by national prognosticators. We're considered the number one pick-up opportunity for Democrats this election cycle, and Matt Bevin is the most unpopular governor in the entire country.

**We just need to make sure that we have the resources we need in this final stretch. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Our marijuana laws are destroying communities and lives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, In 2016, the U.S. incarcerated a whopping 2.2 million of its citizens \-- more than any other country. We also spent over $47 billion to combat drugs, with more than $3 billion of that going to combat marijuana, even though 11 states and the District of Columbia have legalized its recreational use. The result is a lopsided "War on Drugs" that has decimated cities across the country and widened the divides of inequality to new levels: 46.9% of those charged with marijuana possession are Black or Latinx, despite making up only 31.5% of the population and marijuana use being consistent across races. This needs to stop. And it needs to stop at the federal level \-- we can't wait for legislatures to get on board state-by-state. [**Legalizing marijuana would go a long way in reducing these unjust and harmful practices in our legal system, as well as ensuring universal application of the law. Please join us in urging Congress to legalize marijuana today and take a stand for fairness and equality.**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddeb/6e9863e8/156e3307/1db0fd90/1204532762/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/marijuanalegalization/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you, The WDTO Team [SIGN THE PETITION](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddeb/6e9863e8/156e3307/1db0fd90/1204532762/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/marijuanalegalization/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")

body:
| Our movement is shaking up the Democratic Party Friend,

For decades, the Democratic National Committee (DNC) never once had a contested internal election. Throughout those years, DNC members were largely reduced to cardboard props -- existing to listen to speeches, clap, and then vote as the Democratic establishment saw fit.

**But Bernie Sanders changed all of that.** His 2016 campaign launched a progressive movement that in just three years has already transformed the Democratic Party.

Since Our Revolution began, we've had a contested election for every single DNC office -- beginning with Keith Ellison for DNC Chair, and culminating in more than 70 progressives who are now elected members of the DNC. Together, our movement has irreversibly changed how the Democratic Party operates.

[If democracy is going to survive in America, we must complete our transformation of the Democratic Party. That's why I'm asking you directly for help. Will you donate to Our Revolution to help us continue transforming the Democratic Party by ending the influence of the corporate establishment and pushing forward with Bernie Sanders' policy agenda?](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-oct-19?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=22123&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=true&amount=27&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=1+-+If+democracy+is+going+to+survive+in+Amer&utm_campaign=OR_EM_EN_180DO_191011_1_1&source=OR_EM_EN_180DO_191011_1_1")

As Our Revolution board member Jim Zogby said, none of what we've accomplished in the last three years would have been possible if Our Revolution hadn't taken Bernie Sanders' message of transformative, bottom-up change and run with it.

Today, our country's need for transformative change has never been greater. We have an authoritarian buffoon for a president who threatens the stability of our democracy, and a planet that faces a potential mass extinction in the form of an unfolding climate crisis.

**The only thing that stands in the way of both of those existential threats to our families is the progressive policy agenda that Our Revolution has worked so hard alongside Bernie Sanders to establish as the primary language of Democratic voters.**

[Donate now to help us defeat the power of corporate Democrats and complete the transformation of the Democratic Party into a progress-led organization that truly works for the best interests of working Americans ->](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-oct-19?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=22123&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=true&amount=27&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=2+-+Donate+now+to+help+us+defeat+the+power+o&utm_campaign=OR_EM_EN_180DO_191011_1_1&source=OR_EM_EN_180DO_191011_1_1") | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Joey=2C_Team_Juli=C3=A1n?=
subject: equality for all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcfdf/3eb3e2fc/53e95b9f/744c516b/1201248945/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.julianforthefuture.com?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20191011_em_pol_coming-out-day&source=20191011_em_pol_coming-out-day")
---
| | **Happy #NationalComingOutDay!** |
---

** As a member of the LGBTQ community, it's been incredibly rewarding to work for a leader who unabashedly stands up for everyone. **
[Julian Castro has a long-standing track record supporting our LGBTQ+ family.](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcfdf/3eb3e2fc/53e95b9f/744c516a/1201248945/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://www.newnownext.com/julian-castro-interview-2020-queer-voters/10/2019?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+Juliaacuten+Castro+has+a+longstanding+tr&utm_campaign=20191011_em_pol_coming-out-day&source=20191011_em_pol_coming-out-day")
-> In 2009, Julian was the first San Antonio mayor to serve as grand marshal for the city's the Pride Parade.
-> As mayor of San Antonio, he championed the Non-Discrimination Ordinance, banning discrimination on the basis of sexual orientation and gender identity in public accommodations, housing and city employment.
-> As Secretary of Housing and Urban Development, Julian issued a groundbreaking rule ensuring the LGBTQ+ community had equal access to housing services.
**And when critics said to leave the trans community out of these policies, Juli an refused.**
---

**As a candidate for president, Juli an has continued to lift up and fight for [LGBTQ+ equality](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcfdf/3eb3e2fc/53e95b9f/744c5169/1201248945/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://issues.juliancastro.com/lgbtq/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3+-+LGBTQ+equality&utm_campaign=20191011_em_pol_coming-out-day&source=20191011_em_pol_coming-out-day").**
-> He was the first candidate to address [trans rights in terms of reproductive justice](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcfdf/3eb3e2fc/53e95b9f/744c5168/1201248945/VEsC/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro/status/1144076626482925568?s=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=4+-+trans+rights+in+terms+of+reproductive+ju&utm_campaign=20191011_em_pol_coming-out-day&source=20191011_em_pol_coming-out-day").
-> Just this week, [Julian traveled to Matamoros, Mexico to escort LGBTQ+ migrants](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcfdf/3eb3e2fc/53e95b9f/744c5157/1201248945/VEsD/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.latimes.com/politics/story/2019-10-07/julian-castro-helps-lgbtq-migrants-trump-remain-in-mexico-plan-cross-border?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=5+-+Juliaacuten+traveled+to+Matamoros+Mexico&utm_campaign=20191011_em_pol_coming-out-day&source=20191011_em_pol_coming-out-day") who have been persecuted across the border to get asylum.
-> Yesterday, our campaign was the first to launch a [#ChildrenFirst Foster Care plan](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcfdf/3eb3e2fc/53e95b9f/744c5156/1201248945/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://issues.juliancastro.com/children-first/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6+-+ChildrenFirst+Foster+Care+plan&utm_campaign=20191011_em_pol_coming-out-day&source=20191011_em_pol_coming-out-day"), highlighting the issues LGBTQ+ youth face in finding a home, and the executive action Julian will take to eliminate discriminatory rules that prevent LGBTQ+ families from fostering or adopting.
-> And last night at the **HRC / CNN Equality Town Hall** - wearing a ribbon honoring the 49 lives lost at the Pulse nightclub shooting - Julian stood up for sweeping LGBTQ+ equality, including a [commitment to make foreign aid contingent upon human rights for the LGTBQ community](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcfdf/3eb3e2fc/53e95b9f/744c5155/1201248945/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.cnn.com/videos/politics/2019/10/11/julian-castro-lgbtq-foreign-aid-cnn-town-hall-vpx.cnn/video/playlists/cnn-lgbtq-town-hall/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+commitment+to+make+foreign+aid+contingen&utm_campaign=20191011_em_pol_coming-out-day&source=20191011_em_pol_coming-out-day") in other countries of the world.
[](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcfdf/3eb3e2fc/53e95b9f/744c5154/1201248945/VEsO/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/CarlosGSmith/status/1182492718875983872?s=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=8&utm_campaign=20191011_em_pol_coming-out-day&source=20191011_em_pol_coming-out-day")
---

In June, we marched together in the San Antonio Pride Parade. For each float the crowd would enthusiastically cheer, but when the Secretary came into view, **they were electric**.
When your community supports you, you know it. When your community doesn't, you know it too. It was clear from their passion that this community once led by Mayor Julian Castro knew they had his support.
**Today, on #NationalComingOutDay, our team wants you to know that his support and that of everyone on Team Julian will continue to be unwavering.**
We hope you can find the strength, love and acceptance that allows you to live your very best life.
\---
In solidarity,
Joey Czajkowski
National Finance Director, Julian for the Future

---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcfdf/3eb3e2fc/53e95b9f/744c5150/1201248945/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.instagram.com/juliancastrotx/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12&utm_campaign=20191011_em_pol_coming-out-day&source=20191011_em_pol_coming-out-day")
---
| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcfdf/3eb3e2fc/53e95b9f/744c515f/1201248945/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191011_em_pol_coming-out-day&source=20191011_em_pol_coming-out-day")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcfdf/3eb3e2fc/53e95b9f/744c515e/1201248945/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=20191011_em_pol_coming-out-day&source=20191011_em_pol_coming-out-day"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcfdf/3eb3e2fc/53e95b9f/744c515d/1201248945/VEsHAA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=15+-+here&utm_campaign=20191011_em_pol_coming-out-day&source=20191011_em_pol_coming-out-day"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.
---

| | Peter,

A few days ago we asked you to give your feedback on access to health care in Kentucky. It was clear from your responses that you want a governor who will make sure that our people can see a doctor when they get sick, have coverage for prescription medication and won't be discriminated against by insurance companies because of a preexisting condition.

Matt Bevin is trying to let insurance companies get away with covering none of that. **Andy is standing up for working families ' access to _quality affordable_ health care.**

It's a stark difference in this race. [](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeDwuG0almTZT7rKwoxdnpXGJiotikazSsrGTpsouRZgm4&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191011_s&n=1) Hey Team, We have an important meeting with the Governor this Sunday to plot out the campaign for the rest of 2019\. This means we’ll be making major decisions about our field program, media buys, and other large purchases that will impact this campaign for the rest of the cycle.
